leadText: The Full Restore (Japanese: かいふくのくすり Recovery Medicine) is a type of medicine introduced in Generation I. It fully restores a Pokémon's HP and cures it of all non-volatile status conditions and confusion. It is an improved counterpart of the Potion, Super Potion, Hyper Potion, Max Potion, and Full Heal.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generation I [ edit | edit source ] When used from the Bag on a Pokémon, it fully restores a Pokémon's HP and cures the Pokémon of all non-volatile status conditions ( poison , paralysis , sleep , burn , freeze ). In Pokémon Yellow , it also increases friendship when used on the player's Pikachu . Generation II onward [ edit | edit source ] When used in a battle , Full Restore now also cures confusion . In the Generation II games , an oversight causes the item to not cure a Pokémon of Nightmare (even after waking up from sleep) when used by an opponent in battle.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Stad Fully restores HP and cures all ailments, such as poisoning. G S C Fully restores HP & status. R S E Colo XD Fully restores the HP and status of a Pok é mon . FR LG A medicine that fully restores the HP and heals any status problems of one Pok é mon . D P Pt HG SS B W B2 W2 A medicine that fully restores the HP and heals any status problems of a single Pokémon. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh A medicine that can be used to fully restore the HP of a single Pokémon and heal any status conditions it has. BD SP A spray-type medicine that can be used to fully restore the HP of a single Pokémon and heal any status conditions it has. LA A topical medicine meant to be applied to Pokémon. It can be used to fully restore the max HP of a single Pokémon and cure any status conditions it has. S V ZA A medicine that can be used to fully restore the max HP of a Pokémon and cure any status conditions it may have.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Conq. Restores HP and cures status ailments.

sections.text: Contents 1 In the core series games 1.1 Price 1.2 Effect 1.2.1 Generation I 1.2.2 Generation II onward 1.3 Wonder Launcher 1.4 Description 1.5 Acquisition 1.5.1 Distribution In the core series games [ edit | edit source ] Price [ edit | edit source ] Games Cost Sell price R G B Y / R B Y G S C R S E FR LG D P Pt HG SS B W B2 W2 X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP $ 3,000 $ 1,500 LA $ 2,500 $ 625 S V $ 3,000 $ 750 ZA $ 1,500 $ 375 In Pokémon Crystal , Full Restore cost $ 600 during the Goldenrod Department Store rooftop sale . Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generation I [ edit | edit source ] When used from the Bag on a Pokémon, it fully restores a Pokémon's HP and cures the Pokémon of all non-volatile status conditions ( poison , paralysis , sleep , burn , freeze ). In Pokémon Yellow , it also increases friendship when used on the player's Pikachu . Generation II onward [ edit | edit source ] When used in a battle , Full Restore now also cures confusion . In the Generation II games , an oversight causes the item to not cure a Pokémon of Nightmare (even after waking up from sleep) when used by an opponent in battle. Wonder Launcher [ edit | edit source ] The Full Restore appears as a Wonder Launcher item. It costs 13 points to use.
